title: The Mystery of Peter Falconio's Disappearance

scenes.text: A vanishing act in the outback leaves many questions.
Peter Falconio disappeared while traveling in the Northern Territory of Australia in 2001.
Despite extensive searches, no trace of him has ever been found.
The case gained international attention, yet remains unsolved.
scenes.label: INTERNATIONAL CASE

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Northern Territory, Australia - 2001. Peter Falconio vanished during a road trip, and despite extensive searches, he has never been found. Follow for daily mysteries!
